summary: Frontend Routing Separation & Route Guards testing completed. All 14 test cases passed. MarketingLayout correctly renders on public routes (/, /leaderboard, /pricing, /login). AppLayout correctly renders on authenticated routes (/dashboard, /alerts). ProtectedRoute redirects unauthenticated users to /login. PublicOnlyRoute redirects authenticated users from /login to /dashboard. MobileBottomNav visible only on app routes (mobile viewport).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend routing separation is fully functional. MarketingLayout (Home, Leaderboard, Pricing, Sign In, Get Started) serves public routes (/, /leaderboard, /pricing, /login, /register). AppLayout (Dashboard, Live Signals, Research, Strategy Lab, AI Agents, More dropdown, user dropdown, mode badge) serves authenticated routes (/dashboard, /live-signals, /alerts, /admin, etc.). ProtectedRoute allows demo mode users through without auth. PublicOnlyRoute redirects authenticated users from /login and /register to /dashboard. MobileBottomNav (Dashboard, Leaderboard, Alerts, Settings) only visible on app routes in mobile viewport. When authenticated, landing page shows Dashboard button instead of Sign In/Get Started.

marketing_layout_routes: Landing page (/) shows MarketingLayout nav - PASS
Login page shows MarketingLayout nav - PASS
MarketingLayout has Home, Leaderboard, Pricing, Sign In, Get Started - PASS
protected_route_redirects: Unauthenticated visit to /dashboard redirects to /login - PASS
Unauthenticated visit to /live-signals redirects to /login - PASS
Unauthenticated visit to /admin redirects to /login - PASS
app_layout_after_login: Login with valid credentials redirects to /dashboard - PASS
AppLayout has Dashboard, Live Signals, Research, Strategy Lab, AI Agents - PASS
AppLayout has More dropdown with all items - PASS
AppLayout has system mode badge (LIVE MODE) - PASS
public_only_route: Authenticated user visiting /login redirects to /dashboard - PASS
authenticated_landing_page: Landing page shows MarketingLayout when authenticated - PASS
Dashboard button shown instead of Sign In for authenticated user - PASS
Sign In button hidden for authenticated user - PASS
mobile_bottom_nav: MobileBottomNav NOT visible on landing page (marketing route) - PASS
MobileBottomNav NOT visible on /leaderboard (marketing route) - PASS
MobileBottomNav has Dashboard, Leaderboard, Alerts, Settings items - PASS
